overall.description: A first-person walk through a 1930s American city at dawn, featuring wet cobblestone streets, vintage automobiles, brick warehouses with painted advertisements, and industrial smokestacks. The video game footage showcases cinematic lighting with warm sunrise tones reflecting off puddles on the pavement.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet cobblestone street beside a grey apartment building, turning left at the corner to reveal a large brick warehouse with a 'Drink with a Kick' mural and 'Storage Warehouse Company' signage. The street features tram tracks and utility poles against a pink dawn sky.

events.description: yellow vintage automobile drives past from right to left across the view

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk past industrial buildings and smokestacks

multi-story yellow brick building with ground-floor storefronts

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the street with tram tracks, passing industrial brick buildings with prominent smokestacks emitting smoke. A yellow vintage car drives past on the road, and the warehouse buildings recede into the background.

segments.scene_description: Walking past a 'PARK HERE' sign while approaching a busy intersection. The 'Meat & Poultry' building with a 'Swift's' sign becomes visible ahead. A pedestrian in a white shirt stands near the corner as vintage cars navigate the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with tram tracks

events.description: crosses the street intersection, navigating around vintage vehicles
continues straight across the wide intersection toward the opposite street

yellow vintage car parked near the corner

row of green leafy trees along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide wet intersection with tram tracks, passing a pedestrian in a white shirt. The 'Meat & Poultry' building dominates the right side while vintage cars including a black sedan navigate the crossing. The scene opens into a broader urban plaza with multiple streetcar tracks visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet residential corner into a bustling industrial intersection under a pink dawn sky. It begins by walking along a wet cobblestone street beside a grey apartment building, turning left to reveal a large brick warehouse adorned with a Drink with a Kick mural and Storage Warehouse Company signage. As the camera proceeds along tram tracks, the scene shifts toward a more industrial landscape where smokestacks emit plumes of smoke and a yellow vintage car drives past. The movement then leads past a Park Here sign toward a busy intersection, where the Meat & Poultry building and a pedestrian in a white shirt come into view. Finally, the camera crosses the wide, wet intersection amidst black sedans and streetcar tracks, opening into a broad urban plaza.
